name: Terraform Cloud
description: Monitor Terraform Cloud workspaces for infrastructure environment separation and inventory compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Terraform Cloud (app.terraform.io)
2. Go to User Settings > Tokens
3. Create an API token
4. Paste the token below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create a user or team API token in Terraform Cloud > User Settings > Tokens

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Lists Terraform Cloud workspaces to verify environment separation

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Retrieves Terraform Cloud workspace inventory for infrastructure tracking
